mapper.select:
SELECT c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, c.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, c.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME, c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD, pt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_DIV_NAME, c.UNIT_TYPE_CD,
c.CUT_TYPE_CD, ct.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS CUT_TYPE_NAME,
c.SALE_TYPE_CD, slt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_DIV_NAME, c.LIST_PRICE, c.COST_PRICE,
c.SALE_STATUS_CD, ss.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME,
c.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD,
c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.MOD_ID, c.MOD_DT FROM TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID /* Storage Type: PRODUCT_TYPE / STORAGE_TYPE */ LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND st.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND st.CODE_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' /* Process Type: PRODUCT_TYPE / PROCESS_TYPE */ LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE pt ON c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD = pt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND pt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND pt.CODE_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' /* Cut Type (분리유형): PRODUCT_TYPE / CUT_TYPE */ LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ct ON c.CUT_TYPE_CD = ct.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND ct.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND ct.CODE_ID = 'CUT_TYPE' /* Sale Type: SALE_STATUS / SALE_TYPE */ LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE slt ON c.SALE_TYPE_CD = slt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND slt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND slt.CODE_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' /* Sale Status: SALE_STATUS / SALE_STATUS */ LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ss ON c.SALE_STATUS_CD = ss.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND ss.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND ss.CODE_ID = 'SALE_STATUS'
ORDER BY c.REG_DT DESC
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID

SELECT c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, c.COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, c.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME, c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD, pt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS PROCESS_DIV_NAME, c.UNIT_TYPE_CD,
c.CUT_TYPE_CD, ct.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS CUT_TYPE_NAME,
c.SALE_TYPE_CD, slt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_DIV_NAME, c.LIST_PRICE, c.COST_PRICE,
c.SALE_STATUS_CD, ss.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS SALE_STATUS_NAME,
c.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD,
c.REG_ID, c.REG_DT, c.MOD_ID, c.MOD_DT FROM TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON c.STORAGE_TYPE_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND st.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND st.CODE_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE pt ON c.PROCESS_TYPE_CD = pt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND pt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND pt.CODE_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ct ON c.CUT_TYPE_CD = ct.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND ct.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PRODUCT_TYPE' AND ct.CODE_ID = 'CUT_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE slt ON c.SALE_TYPE_CD = slt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND slt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND slt.CODE_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ss ON c.SALE_STATUS_CD = ss.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND ss.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' AND ss.CODE_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' WHERE c.COMPONENT_PROD_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT ( COMPONENT_PROD_CODE, COMPONENT_PROD_NAME, SELLER_MEMBER_ID, STORAGE_TYPE_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, UNIT_TYPE_CD, CUT_TYPE_CD, SALE_TYPE_CD, LIST_PRICE, COST_PRICE, SALE_STATUS_CD, EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{componentGoodsCd}, #{productName}, #{saleMemberNo}, #{storageTypeCd}, #{processDivCd}, #{stockUnitCd}, #{cutTypeCd}, #{saleDivCd}, #{salePrice}, #{costPrice}, #{saleStatus}, #{exposureStatusCd}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{modId}, NOW() )
